extraction.one_line_summary: VAN GARDEREN attacked in final kilometers to win Stage 18 while DUMOULIN neutralized multiple QUINTANA attacks to defend maglia rosa
tactical_patterns: DUMOULIN used time trial power to bridge back immediately after summit rather than chasing before crest
QUINTANA launched multiple accelerations but never committed fully without ANACONA support failing tactical execution
PINOT opportunistically gained 90+ seconds on GC rivals by following late moves without initiating work
ZAKARIN attacked from 2:40 down showing teams outside podium positions willing to gamble late stage

rider_signals.VAN GARDEREN Tejay: positive: won from breakaway outsprinting LANDA showing recovered form after GC ambitions ended
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: isolated by team but neutralized attacks through superior pacing judgment on summit transitions
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: multiple attacks gained nothing revealing lack of decisive acceleration against DUMOULIN
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: negative: forced to chase for group while DUMOULIN refused work showing tactical weakness at 53s
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: jumped to 1:36 from distant position by refusing chase work and following late moves
rider_signals.ZAKARIN Ilnur: positive: attacked to 1:58 from 2:40+ showing willingness to speculate from non-podium positions
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: neutral: second place again enhancing KOM but still cannot convert breakaway presence to wins
